General.Name: Cathay Pacific Airways Limited
General.Description: Cathay Pacific Airways Limited, together with its subsidiaries, offers international passenger and air cargo transportation services. The company provides airline operations, including catering, cargo terminal operations, ground handling services, and commercial laundry operations, as well as scheduled services. The company operates in the Americas, Europe, Southeast Asia and Oceania, North Asia, South Asia, the Middle East, and Africa. As of June 30, 2025, it operates 234 aircraft and 93 new passenger and freighter aircraft. Cathay Pacific Airways Limited was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Lantau Island, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Hong Kong International Airport, Lantau Island, Hong Kong
